menu.name: MainMenu
menu.option: Opens the Component menu.
Opens the Board menu.
Opens the Order menu.
Prompts for an Order ID and writes its JSON manifest to the Downloads folder.
Stops the application and flushes logs.

menu.name: ComponentMenu
menu.description: Manage Components. Reached via Main Menu option 1.
menu.option: Lists every Component with ID, name, description, and quantity.
Prompts for name, description, and quantity, then creates a new Component.
Prompts for a Component ID, then for new values (press Enter to keep current value).
Prompts for a search term and matches against name or description.
Prompts for a Component ID and removes it if found.
Returns to the Main Menu.

menu.name: BoardMenu
menu.description: Manage Boards and their assigned Components. Reached via Main Menu option 2.
menu.option: Lists every Board with its attributes, including assigned Components.
Prompts for name, description, length (mm), and width (mm), then creates a new Board.
Prompts for a Board ID, then for new values (press Enter to keep current value).
Prompts for a search term and matches against name or description.
Prompts for a Board ID and removes it if found.
Lists Boards and Components, then links a chosen Component to a chosen Board.
Prompts for a Board ID and a Component ID, then unlinks them.
Returns to the Main Menu.

menu.name: OrderMenu
menu.description: Manage Orders and their assigned Boards. Reached via Main Menu option 3.
menu.option: Lists every Order with its attributes, including assigned Boards and their Components.
Prompts for name, description, and order date (defaults to today), then creates a new Order.
Prompts for an Order ID, then for new values (press Enter to keep current value).
Prompts for a search term and matches against name or description.
Prompts for an Order ID and removes it if found.
Lists Orders and Boards, then links a chosen Board to a chosen Order.
Prompts for an Order ID and a Board ID, then unlinks them.
Returns to the Main Menu.

notes.note: Any prompt asking for an ID accepts only the integer shown in brackets next to each listed item, e.g. "[3] 0805 Resistor".
Edit prompts that show a current value in brackets (e.g. "Name [0805 Resistor]:") can be left blank to keep that value unchanged.
Downloaded Order JSON files are written to a "Downloads" folder created next to the application executable.
